title: Cemeteries exempt
doc_html:
§459. Cemeteries exempt

            The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to any family burial ground or religious, fraternal, municipal, state, or federal cemetery.

            Acts 1974, No. 417, §1; Acts 2022, No. 574, §1.
doc_text:
§459.  Cemeteries exempt
The provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to any family burial ground or
religious, fraternal, municipal, state, or federal cemetery.
Acts 1974, No. 417, §1; Acts 2022, No. 574, §1.
